estimator.title: Estimate
estimator.clearAllTitle: Remove all items added to the estimate
estimator.clearAllConfirm: This will remove all items added to the estimate. Are you sure?
estimator.empty: Check rows in the rate table to add them to the estimate
estimator.spotNote: Spot prices fluctuate, so this estimate is a reference value at the time of retrieval.

serviceCard.liveNoteTitle: Live retrieval without disk cache. Updated only when opened and when the refresh button is pressed
serviceCard.refreshTitle: Re-fetch the rates for this service
serviceCard.inlineError: Update failed (showing the previously fetched cached data)
serviceCard.licenseUnresolvedNote: The license model could not be distinguished, so some Savings Plans rows are shown without distinguishing license conditions.
serviceCard.ecsNoRi: ECS (Fargate) does not support Reserved Instances.
